title: Willis Towers Watson Public Limited Company (WTW) CEO Carl Hess on Q2 2022 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: Willis Towers Watson Public Limited Company (NASDAQ:WTW ) Q2 2022 Earnings Conference Call July 28, 2022 9:00 AM ET Company Participants Carl Hess - Chief Executive Officer Andrew Krasner - Chief Financial Officer Conference Call Participants Gregory Peters - Raymond James Paul Newsome - Piper Sandler Elyse Greenspan - Wells Fargo David Motemaden - Evercore ISI Robert Cox - Goldman Sachs Mark Hughes - Truist Yaron Kinar - Jefferies Brian Meredith - UBS Shlomo Rosenbaum - Stifel Josh Shanker - Bank of America Ryan Tunis - Autonomous Mark Marcon - Baird Operator Good morning, and welcome to WTW Second Quarter 2022 Earnings Conference Call. Please refer to wtwco.com for the press release and supplemental information that was issued earlier today.

title: Willis Towers (WTW) Q2 Earnings Beat Estimates, Revenues Miss
text: Willis Towers (WTW) Q2 results reflect lower expenses, offset by the soft performance of the Health, Wealth & Career and Risk & Broking segments.

title: Can Willis Towers (WTW) Pull Off a Surprise in Q2 Earnings?
text: Willis Towers' (WTW) second-quarter results are likely to reflect the impact of increased demand for advisory work, new business in North America, increased retention, technology sales and lower expenses.

title: Why WTW (WTW) Is Buying Butterwire
text: WTW (NASDAQ: WTW) announced it is buying Butterwire, a FinTech provider of data analytics, artificial intelligence (AI) and machine learning platforms. This is why.

title: Why Should You Stay Invested in Willis Towers (WTW) Stock
text: Segmental strength, solid capital position and favorable growth estimates make Willis Towers (WTW) stock worth retaining in one's portfolio.
